storyboard.content: I've been feeling much more thirsty than usual and drinking a lot more water.
I'm urinating much more frequently, sometimes waking up 3 to 4 times at night to use the bathroom.
I've been hungrier than usual but I'm actually losing weight without trying.
My vision has been a bit blurry lately.
All of these symptoms have been coming on gradually over the past 2 to 3 months.
The frequent urination is disrupting my sleep and the fatigue affects my daily routine, but I'm still able to function.
I'm a 52-year-old man who is overweight and has a family history of diabetes.
